summary: Excellent matrix recording of a nonstop rockin’ show highlighted by smoking Shakedown Street, Music, Rider and Terrapin.
review: The reviewer raves that this performance rocks from start to finish with standout moments on Shakedown Street, Music, Rider and Terrapin, calling it the kind of show worth traveling for. The matrix source is praised as the best available, delivering clear, hot sound throughout the set.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the high‑energy performance and the top‑quality matrix recording, indicating an exceptional show with excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes this matrix as the best of all available, implying clear, balanced sound with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy from opening to close; the set rocks nonstop and keeps listeners engaged throughout.

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer specifically notes Phil 'ROckS' through this show, highlighting his strong performance.
